title: chrysosplenium hebetatum
intro: Chrysosplenium hebetatum, also known as the sleepy spleenwort or hebetate wood-sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Chrysosplenium hebetatum is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and it may also be used in herbal remedies in combination with other plants.
